title: Tiggy, Riggy, and the Rainbow Fish
summary: In a series of imaginative tales, several small mice embark on grand adventures. Tiggy the Mouse celebrates Christmas by gifting a leaf and a rock to his friend Pliggy, followed by a cozy breakfast of vegetable soup. Meanwhile, the duo Jiggy and Riggy journey across the ocean with the help of Hootie the Owl, discovering an island playground and conquering mountains together. Another mouse named Booty spends his evening building a magnificent Magnatile mansion for his many toys. Finally, beneath the waves, the Rainbow Fish discovers that true happiness comes from sharing his shimmering beauty with others, proving that generosity is the most valuable treasure of all.

highlightQuote.text: I will carry you up the lad... actually there's stairs on the front, you can climb up.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Imagine back. Now it's time for stars and stories. How about we tell a story...

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: About a mouse! Called a mouse and his name was Shriggy.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Shriggy?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: No, Tiggy. Tiggy the mouse.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Tiggy's a mouse. Oh, and what happens in the story about Tiggy the mouse?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I don't know, let's find out in see-da-da.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Okay, let's find out.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And he's got a red crystal flashlight in the story.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Let's imagine the story of Tiggy the mouse woke up one day and it was a very special day because it was Christmas. And he walked out of his house—oops we turned off the flashlight.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: On!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And Tiggy Mouse walked out of his house and he saw another mouse. He saw...

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Pliggy the mouse.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Pliggy Mouse, and Pliggy Mouse was sad because he didn't have any Christmas presents. So Tiggy said, 'I know what to do. I'll find something to give to you for Christmas.' So what did he go and find?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: He found a leaf and a rock.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: A leaf and a rock. And so Tiggy Mouse brought them back to, what's the other mouse's name, Pliggy?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Pliggy.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Tiggy brought the leaf and the rock to Pliggy Mouse and he said, 'Here you are, Merry Christmas!' And what did Pliggy Mouse say?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Thank you.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, because it was such a nice present. And then they both sat down and they had a delicious Christmas breakfast. What did they eat?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: They ate vegetable soup.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: They had vegetable soup for breakfast. The end. Lots more stories?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Lots more stories!

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Jiggy the mouse and Riggy the man.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Jiggy the mouse and Riggy the man. They went on an adventure one day to go to the top of a mountain. But the mountain was far away. And first they had to cross the ocean. So how did they cross the ocean?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Using their feet.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: But then they got to the edge of the ocean and they found the waves splashing. And they said, 'Oh no, we can't walk any further. The ocean is wet. What can we do?'

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: You could use your shoes!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: But then the water got too deep and they didn't know how to swim. So they said, 'We're going to need some help.' Who did they get help from?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Hootie the owl!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: The big owl flew down and said, 'Hoo hoo hoo. How can I help you, mice?' And what did Hootie the owl say?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I would love to do that.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Just climb on my back and we'll fly all the way to the mountain. Hootie landed on the beach and said, 'We're here on the island with the tall mountain.' And what did Jiggy and Riggy do?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Now they were on a playground with under mountains and they have very big tall tall slides that they could go down.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And it was a blue slide.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Jiggy started to climb up the ladder. But then he slipped a little bit and almost fell. Whoa! And what did Riggy say?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I will carry you up the lad... actually there's stairs on the front, you can climb up.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Thanks Riggy, I didn't realize. And then they both climbed the stairs and then Jiggy slid down the slide—wee!—and then Riggy slid down the slide—wee!

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: There's another mountain that's small on the back of the playground.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, yes. That'll be easier to climb. But we still need some help. Who can help us?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: No, we don't need help.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: They only need each other. And so they held hands and they climbed and they climbed. Tada! They made it to the top of the little mountain. What did they do when they got to the top?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: They walked there and they walked down, down, down.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: They walked a far away.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: They put all the way up and on top and down on the bottom of the Christmas tree... the mice's presents under there.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Booty the mouse.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Once upon a time, Booty the mouse had just finished eating dinner. Yum. And so he decided to go and play. What was he going to go play with?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: His Magnatiles.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: A little house for the mice toys.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Some little toys for the mice. There were many and many and many toys. There was very many of toys.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: He builded it with Magnatiles and put the toys in and his mouse walked in and he said, 'Yay, you build me a house!' Those are all all the stories that we have time for today.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I'm able to tell books. I'll pick one to read.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: All Treasures for Our Bodies.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: The Rainbow Fish.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: A long way out in the deep blue sea, there lived a fish. Not just an ordinary fish, but the most beautiful fish in the entire ocean.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Rainbow Fish, wait for me. Please give me one of your shiny scales. They are so wonderful and you have so many.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Finally, the Rainbow Fish had only one shining scale left. His most prized possessions had been given away. Yet, he was very happy. 'Come on, Rainbow Fish,' they called, 'come and play with us.'

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Not yet!

characters.name: Tiggy the Mouse
characters.description: A mouse with a red crystal flashlight who enjoys giving gifts on Christmas.

characters.name: Pliggy Mouse
characters.description: Tiggy's friend who receives a leaf and a rock as Christmas presents.

characters.name: Jiggy
characters.description: A mouse who goes on an island adventure to climb a mountain.

characters.name: Riggy
characters.description: A man who accompanies Jiggy the mouse on an island adventure.

characters.name: Hootie the Owl
characters.description: A large owl who helps the mice fly across the ocean.

characters.name: Booty the Mouse
characters.description: A mouse who builds a house for his toys using Magnatiles.

characters.name: The Rainbow Fish
characters.description: A beautiful fish with shimmering scales who learns the joy of sharing.

characters.name: The Octopus
characters.description: A wise sea creature who advises the Rainbow Fish on how to find happiness.

characters.name: The Starfish
characters.description: A sea creature who guides the Rainbow Fish to the wise octopus.

places.name: The Island
places.description: Across the vast ocean lies a remote expanse where sun-bleached sandy beaches give way to a suffocatingly dense jungle. Above the emerald canopy, a range of jagged, cloud-piercing mountains dominates the horizon, shielding a lonely playground nestled strangely within the wild, untamed terrain.

places.name: The Playground
places.description: This inclusive island recreational area features soaring wing-rails and traditional swings anchored by a grand tower with a vibrant blue slide and ascending stairs. Designed for every species, the school grounds transform during rainfall into a landscape of shimmering puddles where Hattie retreats to play amidst the thoughtfully integrated architecture.

places.name: The Tall Mountain
places.description: A high peak on the island that Jiggy and Riggy seek to conquer.

places.name: The Small Mountain
places.description: A smaller mountain located at the back of the playground.

places.name: The Deep Blue Sea
places.description: The home of the Rainbow Fish and his ocean friends.

places.name: The Christmas Tree
places.description: The place where mice gather to put their holiday presents.
